description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof design, featuring a combination of white and black exterior walls accented by blue roof sections. The property is enclosed by a low perimeter wall and includes a spacious front yard with green lawns, a driveway, and a detached garage. The backyard is landscaped with palm trees, outdoor seating, and a patio area marked by geometric patterns. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is defined by a simple gate and a short path leading to the front door, with minimal decorative elements. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a clean, contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern two-story house with flat blue roofs, white and black walls, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and a large green lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with palm trees, patio seating, and geometric landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, backyard patio, and additional green space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage, side lawn, and the rear of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a short path, minimal overhang, and a basic gate, lacking ornate features.
